meaning: n.舔,少许,打vt.舔,卷过,鞭打,克服,征服vi.轻轻拍打
examples: Well I will lick you, if you fool with me.
"And I didn't have to lick them, either," he added.
As investors, we will lick our wounds and move on to the next opportunity.
If we can prevent kids from ever starting to smoke, then we can lick this problem.
